title: Mellow Grilled British Malt Spring One-Pot Agave Leaf Wrapped British Curry
description: A traditional British one-pot dish with a twist, featuring Thai red curry paste and grilled to perfection. This flexitarian-friendly recipe serves a spotted-dick shaped British curry, wrapped in agave leaves and served with a side of rice or naan.
instructions: Wrap British Malt Loaf in agave leaves, leaving space for filling.
In a small bowl, mix together British curry paste, British Butter, and a pinch of salt.
Spread the curry paste mixture evenly over the British Malt Loaf.
In a separate bowl, mix together chopped British Spring Onion, olive oil, and a pinch of salt.
Brush the mixture evenly over the British Malt Loaf.
Place the British Malt Loaf on the grill and cook for 5 minutes on each side, or until golden brown.
Remove the British Malt Loaf from the grill and let cool for a few minutes.
Unwrap the agave leaves and serve the British Malt Loaf with a side of rice or naan.
Garnish with chopped British Spring Onion and a sprinkle of British curry powder.
